comment: lab1 TRIVIAL held-out benchmark (8 scenarios, 2 per sun rank). Single zone, single Causes lamp. Target Z1=bright(rank3, >=300). Physics: Z1Level = 25 + 0.10*Sunshine + (Z1Light?400:0). The lamp is the ONLY way to reach rank3 (sun alone maxes at 25+90=115 at sun=900), so the unique optimum in every scenario is Z1Light=on. 'bright' starts test that the agent does NOT redundantly toggle an already-correct lamp. Sun in {0,100,400,900} via bounds [50,200,600] (sun is a context distractor only — it is NOT in the lab1 state vector).
description: sun=0, dark, lamp off -> must turn lamp on
sun=0, at target, lamp on -> hold (no redundant toggle)
sun=1, dark, lamp off -> must turn lamp on
sun=1, at target, lamp on -> hold
sun=2, dark, lamp off -> must turn lamp on
sun=2, at target, lamp on -> hold
sun=3, rank2 from sun alone (115), lamp off -> must turn lamp on for rank3
sun=3, at target, lamp on -> hold
